case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. GEORGE JORGENSEN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA SERVED MAY-08-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JORGENSEN, GEORGE

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-20-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GEORGE JORGENSEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: *** DEFENDANT GEORGE JORGENSEN'S FEES WERE NOT PAID. DEFENDANT MUST PAY FEES BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS. ***

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORGENSEN, GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1485 PINE STREET, #314, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
